content.en:
Fengshan Mountain mainly captures Kurosaki alive, which naturally has the meaning of interrogation, and with the background of Fengshan, even if Kurosaki is determined, it is difficult to keep his secret.

About ten days had passed, and the Flame Split Dao Ancestor had informed them of the results of the interrogation.

"Didn't Kurosaki do it?"

Ye Tian frowned.

He originally thought that what Kurosaki said that day was false, but he didn't expect that the Devouring Clan who was devouring the universe and the Chaos Continent in the Daoshan Realm was really not him.

What surprised Ye Tian even more was the intelligence behind.

According to the information found out by the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord, there were a total of three Devouring Clans in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, all of whom were half-step domain ancestors comparable to the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and one of them was even on the verge of promotion, once he was allowed to devour several top-level Dao realms, or a few forbidden void realms, he could even become a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm.

But the Devourer was too cautious to take the lead.

Moreover, the Devouring Clan who was so arrogant in the Daoshan Realm was not the Devouring Clan they knew at all, and as for the identity of the Devouring Clan, they didn't know what it was.

"It's hard to do!"

Ye Tian frowned.

I thought that the Devouring Clan was hidden in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but he didn't expect that even Kurosaki, the Devouring Clan, didn't know the identity of the mysterious Devouring Clan, what this meant, he knew very well.

In other words, it is very likely that the Devourer is another Devouring Clan's power, and now there is only one, and if there are not just one Devourer, but many, the threat will be too great.

The key is that if the other party is hidden somewhere in the Dao Mountain Realm, he will not be able to detect the existence of the other party at all, because the Dao Mountain Realm is too big and too big, and he may not be able to use the copying talent to detect the other party after exploring for hundreds of millions of years.

In other words, their operation this time can be regarded as a failure.

Of course, it can't be regarded as a failure, at least I caught one Devouring Clan, and I also knew that there were two Devouring Clans in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which was already very precious intelligence information.

Black Wind Mountain also gave this information to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, after all, the matter about the Devouring Clan is not the matter of the Black Wind Mountain family's forces, and all forces need to unite to avoid the growth of the Devouring Clan.

Otherwise, if the Black Wind Mountain family forces acted alone, it would be difficult to completely find out the traces of the Devouring Clan.

In the following days, the forces of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain sent ten half-step domain ancestors to track down the traces of the Devouring Clan in the Daoshan Realm, and at the same time set up temporary bases in various parts of the Daoshan Realm, monitoring the situation in various areas of the Daoshan Realm at all times, and once the universe disappeared and the Chaos Continent disappeared, they could immediately know the situation.

Of course, this does not necessarily lead to finding the other party, but only increases the hope of finding it.

The Dao Mountain Realm was too large, and the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace were understaffed to fully monitor the entire Dao Mountain Realm.

In fact, there is another way, that is, to send a large number of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors to monitor the entire Dao Mountain Realm, but once they encounter the Devouring Clan, they will almost definitely die, after all, the strength of the Devouring Clan is very strong, and those Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors are simply ants to the Devouring Clan, and they are not even qualified to resist it, so they can only use their lives to warn.

Therefore, once it is carried out like this, many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors will naturally not be willing.

And the True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor are also the foundation of the power, so naturally they will not sacrifice at will.

Therefore, the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain did not carry out this plan, and still only let the half-step domain ancestors investigate, hoping to investigate useful information.

this day.

A piece of news came that shocked many people.

Because at the same time, the two universes in the Dao Mountain Realm, which were very far apart, disappeared.

This represents a signal: the Dao Mountain Realm is devouring more than one Devouring Race in the universe, at least two!

One Devourer and two Devourers represent completely different meanings, if there is only one Devourer, it may be a personal act, once the Devourer is killed, it will be fine.

However, if the two Devouring Clans did this, it might be a collective act, representing that a Devouring Clan force wanted to devour the universe, world, and Chaos Continent of the Daoshan Realm, threatening the safety of the entire Daoshan Realm.

this day.

Several palace masters such as the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and the Xuangui Palace Master of the Dao Mountain Realm had a meeting with the Jinchen Dao Ancestor and the Yan Crack Dao Ancestor of the Black Wind Mountain, discussing the situation of the Devouring Clan.

At the meeting, Jin Chen Dao Ancestor spoke: "According to the situation we investigated, the two Devouring Clans that appeared this time, one is at the half-step Domain Ancestor level, and the other is at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, which should be regarded as relatively young Devouring Clans. And we had previously captured a Devouring Clan at the Ancestor level of the Half-Step Domain of the All Things Realm in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the information we got from him was that they only knew that there were three Devouring Clans in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and they were in the Daoshan Realm with the fragments of the Domain Realm, and they didn't know that there were other Devouring Clans. The Devourers were killed in a long time and almost wiped out, leaving only a few Devourers sleeping to avoid the killing. According to our speculation, there should not be many Devourers, and there are no such arrogant Devourers. So, we have a pretty bold guess!"

"What speculation?"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master asked with some curiosity.

"It is very likely that the Devouring Clan that is devouring the universe in the Dao Mountain Realm is not from our Divine Heaven Realm, but belongs to the Dao Mountain Realm itself!"

Jin Chen Daozu guessed.

"Impossible!" The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master shook his head and denied: "The Dao Mountain Realm is so weak, how could the Devouring Clan be born? If there really is a Devouring Clan, the Dao Mountain Realm would have been wiped out by the Devouring Clan long before we came here!"

"What if these Devourers have been sleeping, and now they're awake!"

Jin Chen Daozu said with a smile.

"You mean......" The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master's expression changed drastically, and he had a guess in his heart.

"It's exactly the kind of speculation you have in mind!" Jin Chen Dao Ancestor: "It is very likely that the Dao Mountain Realm is not the first cultivator civilization, but the second or even the third cultivator civilization era! If it was in the previous civilization, the Devouring Race would have existed, and then it devoured all the universes, worlds, and Chaos Continents, and started a battle with the cultivator civilization, just like the war in the ancient era of our Divine Heaven Realm. The only difference is that we won the war, while the war in the Daoshan Realm was lost. All the cultivators of the Dao Mountain Realm were extinct, the world was gone, the universe was gone, the Chaos Continent was also gone, and the entire realm was empty. Then, a group of Devourers entered the Dark Forbidden Realm, and a group of Devourers chose to sleep, waiting for the next group of cultivators to become more civilized!"

When the other half-step domain ancestors heard this speculation, their expressions suddenly changed drastically.

If the guess is true, then this time it is really a disaster in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and even the entire Dao Mountain Realm!
